title: Bounded Prefetch, Worker Ownership, Ordering, and Backpressure · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Order And Partial Failure
summary: Every map result launches a goroutine, concurrency is unbounded, jobs block after cancellation, output follows completion order, and prefetched failures poison visible state. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go order and partial failure increment in bounded cancellable Pokemon prefetch pipeline. Learners progress through predict…
objectives: Preserve requested order or label completion order, isolate per-item failure, and never commit speculative visible state.
Assign which goroutine creates, sends, closes, drains, cancels, and waits for each channel and result.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
